column1: # dBASE III PLUS 1.1 error code table
# NOTES: codes 32, 40, 69, 135, 151 have empty messages in the source;
#   they are preserved as empty here. The source line 150 had binary
#   garbage after the NUL terminator; message truncated at NUL.
